overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a survival horror game showing a character in a green jacket walking through a heavily fog-shrouded abandoned town. The character moves from a residential street past a neoclassical building and delivery truck, then turns into an industrial alleyway with garages and abandoned vehicles.

scene_state.functional_zone: foggy residential street with overhead power lines

agents.ego_description: walking steadily down the center of a foggy road toward a house with a red roof

entered.detail: multiple electrical wires stretching across the foggy sky
wet asphalt surface with double yellow lines visible
single-story building with distinctive red roof emerging from fog
tall wooden utility pole with street lamp and transformer

segments.scene_description: The character walks down the center of a deserted, fog-shrouded road. Power lines stretch overhead while a house with a red roof materializes from the mist on the left. The atmosphere is thick with fog, limiting visibility to the immediate surroundings.

scene_state.functional_zone: town intersection with neoclassical public building

character passes delivery truck and continues forward past the columned building

large neoclassical building with tall white columns and stone facade

ornate black street lamp with white globe

segments.scene_description: The character approaches an intersection where a stop sign and an impressive columned building emerge from the fog. A delivery truck is parked on the right side of the road. The character walks past the truck and continues alongside the neoclassical building.

events.description: passing from residential area into industrial zone with brick warehouse buildings

agents.ego_description: continuing down the foggy street past brick industrial buildings and abandoned vehicles

notable_agents.action: abandoned truck visible through the dense fog in the distance

dark colored truck parked on the street ahead
metal chain link fence running along the right side of street

segments.scene_description: Moving past the columned building, the character enters a more industrial area with brick warehouse buildings lining the left side. An abandoned truck is visible through the fog ahead, and chain link fencing appears on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial alley with fuel company building and garages

events.description: character turns right into narrow alleyway next to the Speed Fuel Corp building

agents.ego_description: turning right into a narrow alleyway beside the Speed Fuel Corp building

metal roll-up garage doors on the fuel company building
chain link fence topped with barbed wire blocking the alley end

segments.scene_description: The character approaches and turns right into a narrow industrial alley. The Speed Fuel Corp building dominates the left side with its large garage doors. Barbed wire fencing is visible ahead, and the space becomes more enclosed.

scene_state.functional_zone: back alley with parking garages and abandoned vehicles

events.description: passing abandoned cars parked along the alley walls between garage buildings

agents.ego_description: walking through the narrow alley between concrete garage buildings and past abandoned vehicles

notable_agents.action: abandoned red sedan parked in front of garage door

entered.detail: weathered concrete garage structure with metal roll-up door
rusted red sedan parked in front of the garage
large metal pipes and vents attached to industrial building

segments.scene_description: The character proceeds deeper into the narrow back alley, passing abandoned cars parked alongside concrete garage buildings. Industrial pipes and vents are visible on the right wall, and the fog persists in the enclosed space.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a desolate, fog-shrouded town that transitions from an open residential street into a claustrophobic industrial alley. It begins with the character walking down the center of a misty road where power lines stretch overhead and a red-roofed house materializes from the haze. As the character reaches an intersection, the scene opens to reveal a stop sign and a grand columned building, with the camera gliding past a parked delivery truck. The environment then shifts toward an industrial zone as the character moves past brick warehouses and chain-link fencing before turning right into a narrow passage dominated by the Speed Fuel Corp building and its large garage doors. Finally, the space becomes increasingly enclosed as the camera proceeds deeper into the back alley, passing abandoned cars and industrial pipes under a persistent layer of fog.
